notes: The checked-in live capture predates HAR-117's wider merchant-realistic request fixture, so this scenario replays the captured variables and compares the complete DraftOrder payload selected by the capture until live conformance auth can refresh it. Shopify-generated IDs, draft order names, invoice URLs, and the stale captured shipping-line/total values are path-scoped expected differences.

expectedDifferences.reason: The proxy creates a stable synthetic draft order ID while the capture contains the live Shopify draft order ID.
Shopify allocates draft order names from store state; local staging uses a deterministic synthetic sequence.
Invoice URLs are generated per draft order by Shopify and locally synthesized by the proxy.
The proxy creates stable synthetic draft order line item IDs while the capture contains live Shopify IDs.

The stale live capture returned null for shippingLine even though the captured input includes shippingLine; HAR-117 local staging now models it but live capture refresh is blocked by Shopify auth 401.
The stale live capture total excludes the requested shipping line; local staging includes it and live capture refresh is blocked by Shopify auth 401.
